name: Orica Limited
analysis: ORI's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$23.2650, stop A$22.3245, target A$25.8607 (2.76:1) — then trail it.
